response.global_analysis: The audio phonetically matches the provided Reference JSON for the song 'Tada Koe Hitotsu'. All vocals and dialogue have been transcribed with precise timing, splitting segments at natural pauses to ensure readability. On-screen lyrics were used to verify spelling, especially for the slight variation in the final chorus where the singer says '笑うように' (so as to laugh) instead of '泣かぬように' (so as not to cry). The speaking segment following the song was transcribed manually to provide full context for the live stream performance.

subtitles.original: 「答えは、いつ？」
subtitles.english: "When will the answer be written?"

subtitles.original: ほんのり小さな感情へ
subtitles.english: To the faint little emotion

subtitles.original: 愛をひとつ
subtitles.english: Just one love

subtitles.original: またね またね
subtitles.english: See you again, see you again

subtitles.original: 夜に咲く温度と灯るまで
subtitles.english: Until the temperature blooming in the night illuminates

subtitles.original: 呼吸ひとつ
subtitles.english: Just one breath

subtitles.original: 生きる 生きる
subtitles.english: I live, I live

subtitles.original: 優しい日々の横で泣かぬように
subtitles.english: Beside the gentle days, so as not to cry

subtitles.original: あぁ 泣かぬように
subtitles.english: Ah, so as not to cry

subtitles.original: ちっちゃな言葉 チクチクしたの
subtitles.english: Tiny words made me prickle

subtitles.original: キリが無いけどさ
subtitles.english: Though there is no end to them...

subtitles.original: それを忘れたふり 疲れたよ
subtitles.english: I pretended to forget, I was tired

subtitles.original: 夜よ抱きしめて
subtitles.english: Night, hold me tight

subtitles.original: 今日だって笑う 笑う
subtitles.english: Even if I laugh, laugh today

subtitles.original: 泣いちゃう僕を隠すために笑う
subtitles.english: To hide the me who wants to cry

subtitles.original: 言えないことは 言わないで良い
subtitles.english: It's fine not to say things I can't say

subtitles.original: と思えたら軽くなれるのかな
subtitles.english: If I could think that, I might become lighter

subtitles.original: 愛をひとつ
subtitles.english: Just one love

subtitles.original: またね またね
subtitles.english: See you again, see you again

subtitles.original: 夜に咲く温度と灯るまで
subtitles.english: Until the temperature blooming in the night illuminates

subtitles.original: 呼吸ひとつ
subtitles.english: Just one breath

subtitles.original: 生きる 生きる
subtitles.english: I live, I live

subtitles.english: Beside the gentle days, so as not to cry

subtitles.original: 愛をひとつ
subtitles.english: Just one love

subtitles.original: またね またね
subtitles.english: See you again, see you again

subtitles.original: あぁ
subtitles.english: Ah...

subtitles.original: 愛をひとつ
subtitles.english: Just one love

subtitles.original: またね またね
subtitles.english: See you again, see you again

subtitles.original: 優しい日々の横で笑うように
subtitles.english: Beside the gentle days, so as to laugh

subtitles.original: 吐き出す気持ちは簡単だけど
subtitles.english: I let out my simple emotions

subtitles.original: でも生きるの難易度高すぎて
subtitles.english: But living is too challenging

subtitles.original: どうにも解けない問いだらけ
subtitles.english: Too many unsolvable problems

subtitles.original: さっぱり 記っ記り 前向いて
subtitles.english: No need to forget and face forward

subtitles.original: なんてしなくて良いから抱きしめて
subtitles.english: All you need to do is hold me

subtitles.original: 愛をひとつ
subtitles.english: Just one love

subtitles.original: またね またね
subtitles.english: See you again, see you again

subtitles.original: はい、というわけでゲストパートとソロパートでした！
subtitles.english: All right, so that was the guest part and solo part!

subtitles.original: どうでしたか？
subtitles.english: How was it?

subtitles.original: ゲストパートはね、メア、おかゆと、ころねと歌いましたね。
subtitles.english: For the guest part, I sang with Mea, Okayu, and Korone.

subtitles.original: まず1曲目、から始まって、
subtitles.english: Starting with the first song,

subtitles.original: 星間ならびたら白上フブキ、フブキちゃんとすいちゃんが来てくれました！
subtitles.english: and then "Seikan Narabitara", Fubuki-chan and Sui-chan joined me!

subtitles.original: 天使にふれたよで船長と歌って、
subtitles.english: I sang "Tenshi ni Fureta yo" with Senchou,

subtitles.original: カラフルをぺこちゃんと歌いました！
subtitles.english: and "Colorful" with Peko-chan!

subtitles.original: いや、そう、ぺこちゃんとの...
subtitles.english: Yeah, that's right, the one with Peko-chan...

subtitles.original: MCをやったんだけど、
subtitles.english: We did the MC segment together,

subtitles.original: まさか手紙を読んでくれると思わなくて。
subtitles.english: but I never thought she'd read a letter to me.

subtitles.original: いや、正直本当に、あの、ビックリが勝っちゃって。
subtitles.english: Honestly, I was mostly just really surprised.

subtitles.original: あの、「え？手紙書いてきてくれたの？」ってなって。
subtitles.english: I was like, "Huh? You wrote a letter for me?"

subtitles.original: ちょっと「え、え、本当にえ？」みたいな感じのまま...
subtitles.english: I was just like, "Wait, what, really?"

subtitles.original: 驚きを隠せなかったんだけど。
subtitles.english: I couldn't hide my surprise.

subtitles.original: いや、本当に嬉しい。今ちょっとウルっとね、あの、聞いてて、思いました。
subtitles.english: I'm really happy. Listening back to it now makes me feel a bit emotional.

subtitles.original: そう、ぺこちゃんとカラフル歌って、MCにも出てもらいました。
subtitles.english: Yeah, I sang "Colorful" with Peko-chan, and she joined for the MC.

subtitles.original: で、明日の夜空哨戒班、2期生で歌いました！
subtitles.english: And then the 2nd generation sang "Asu no Yozora Shoukaihan"!

subtitles.original: 集まってくれてありがとな。
subtitles.english: Thanks for gathering together.

subtitles.original: スパークルを、
subtitles.english: Sparkle...

subtitles.original: 沙花叉クロヱ、沙花叉と一緒にね、スパークルを歌いました！
subtitles.english: I sang "Sparkle" together with Sakamata Chloe!

subtitles.original: 魔法が成功するかちょっとわかんなかったんですけど、
subtitles.english: I wasn't sure if the magic would work,

subtitles.original: 魔法が成功したみたいで、召喚されてきてくれました。歯ブラシで。
subtitles.english: but it seems it was a success, and she was summoned. With a toothbrush.

subtitles.original: 「またいつでも呼んでくださいね」とか言ってたけど、
subtitles.english: She said, "Please call me again anytime,"

subtitles.original: 卒業ライブなんだわ、こっちは。
subtitles.english: but this is my graduation LIVE.

subtitles.original: 卒業するんだわ。
subtitles.english: I'm graduating.

subtitles.original: 沙花叉ありがとうね、来てくれて。
subtitles.english: Sakamata, thank you for coming.

subtitles.original: 「ときめき最終戦争」と「ただ声一つ」、2曲連続で、
subtitles.english: I sang "Tokimeki Saisyuu Sensou" and "Tada Koe Hitotsu" back-to-back,

subtitles.original: 歌わせていただきました。どうだったでしょうか？
subtitles.english: I sang them. How was it?

subtitles.original: 手紙ね。手紙本当にビックリしたね。
subtitles.english: The letter. I was really surprised by the letter.

subtitles.original: 沙花叉もね、本当に。みんなビックリしてた、ビックリした？
subtitles.english: And Sakamata too. Everyone was surprised, were you guys surprised?

subtitles.original: ありがとね、とか。今ちょっとコメント見てんだよ。
subtitles.english: Thank you. I'm looking at the comments now.

subtitles.original: コメント早すぎてさ、見れねーよ。
subtitles.english: The comments are too fast, I can't keep up.

subtitles.original: 早すぎるよ、コメント。
subtitles.english: Too fast, the comments.

subtitles.original: 「行かないで」... 卒業します。
subtitles.english: "Don't go"... I'm graduating.

subtitles.original: というわけでね、あと2曲となりました。
subtitles.english: So, there are only two songs left.

subtitles.original: 次に歌う曲なんですが、
subtitles.english: The next song I'm going to sing,

subtitles.original: 実はこの配信をするにあたり、
subtitles.english: actually, when preparing for this stream,

subtitles.original: 何を最後にみんなに伝えられたらいいかなっていうのを、
subtitles.english: I was thinking about what I wanted to tell everyone at the end.

subtitles.original: 考えてたんですよ。
subtitles.english: I was thinking about it.

subtitles.original: その中で、実はホロライブの公式ページにある、
subtitles.english: And then, actually, on Hololive's official page,

subtitles.original: シオンのプロフィール...
subtitles.english: Shion's profile...
